items.title: Boeing Stock Rises on a Lot of Good News.  This Is Still the Most Important Bit.
items.description: Boeing delivered 160 jets in the fourth quarter of 2025, up from 57 jets a year ago. There’s a more important figure to keep an eye on.

items.title: Shares Of Boeing, Which Outsold Airbus In 2025, Reach A Buy Point
items.description: Boeing sold more planes than its rival Airbus in 2025.  Last year, Boeing logged 1,173 net orders, compared with Airbus' 889.  This marks the first time since 2018 that Dow Jones component Boeing beat out Airbus in annual sales.
